topic: Gulf Coast Jet Fuel Price March 2026
summary: Current jet fuel ~$2.13-2.17/gal, needs $2.50 for YES. Statistical probability 3-8% depending on model. Oil outlook bearish with EIA forecasting Brent at $58/bbl avg for 2026.
content: Key data: Jan 2026 monthly avg $2.031, Feb daily avg ~$2.127. Gap to $2.50 is ~$0.37 (17.5%). Normal distribution gives 3.1%, fat-tailed t(3) gives 8%. Oil fundamentals very bearish: WTI at $63, EIA forecasts Brent avg $58 for 2026, IEA warns of record 3.7M bpd surplus. OPEC+ maintained cuts through March 2026. Only 1 of 36 months in sample had month-over-month increase >= $0.37. Historical March: 2023 $2.545, 2024 $2.593, 2025 $2.069.
